subject: Support
body:
Only writing to offer my support.

Unfortunately, we've been through a similar process. Somehow - no matter
how difficult - u get thru it and move on.

U helped me thru a very tough moment at Sotheby's, we hung on and
eventually lived to the other side - and now life is really good. I haven't
forgotten what u did and appreciate it just as much today.

So we wish u the best during this time - eventually u too will be on the
other side.

Bobby
